title: Time-to-Evidence Measurement
scientificQuestion: Can Sovryn route hard mixed safe public scientific and technical targets to useful minimum-evidence paths while measuring route errors and avoiding unsupported acceleration claims?
domain: Hard External Workload Pilot for Cross-Domain Evidence Routing OS
limitations: No global 10x acceleration claim is made.
No outside uptake or outside confirmation claim is made.
No prize-significance or discovery-validation claim is made.
Results are bounded to safe public computational and technical target descriptors.
Execution artifacts are minimum-evidence route outputs, not full expert review.
disclaimer: Bounded hard-workload routing pilot. It does not claim broad 10x acceleration, outside uptake, prize significance, broad autonomous intelligence, medical or legal authority, hazardous capability, or universal validity.
